search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with hero lists, levels, and equipment sections; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking character names or gear categories.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, tiers, and equipment context.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page showing badge costs by level and category structure; good for research topic discovery and cost cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge cost tables.
claims_to_verify: Search/index completeness for all laboratory items

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home page linking to heroes, research, alliance, and beginner guides; useful as a navigation hub and for finding related topic pages.
results.primary_user_job: Discover related guide pages and site sections.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page covering hero classes, power factors, and hero-related progression.
results.primary_user_job: Learn hero types and power basics
claims_to_verify: Hero class names and color tiers

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Research building page for technologies; shows unlock level, upgrades, and the second lab unlock path.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to www.packsify.com as required. No matching pages were found for the requested query within the allowed domain and path pattern.

search_records.search_notes: Search returned several Last Z-specific guide pages on the allowed domain. I prioritized concrete gameplay guide pages over generic or alliance-home pages. Generic alliance pages and broad hub pages were excluded as weaker evidence leads.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Detailed building guide for shooter troop training, with unlock requirements and upgrade data.
results.primary_user_job: Find shooter camp unlock and upgrade info
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed effects by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for assaulter troop training and upgrade milestones, including capacity, speed, and power bonuses.
claims_to_verify: Training speed and power bonus values

results.evidence_summary: Research guide for lab progression and tech advancement, including second lab unlock context.
results.primary_user_job: Find research unlock and lab progression info
